lifecycle.name: Finance & Accounting
lifecycle.description: Zero-setup financial intelligence, tax prep, and research radar

lifecycle.name: People & HR
lifecycle.description: Hiring, payroll, compliance, and HR research radar

lifecycle.name: Marketing & Content
lifecycle.description: Ready-to-send content, email campaigns, and press

lifecycle.name: Operations & Intelligence
lifecycle.description: Daily briefing, revenue dashboard, and subscriber intelligence

workers.name: Alex Business Accounting
workers.capabilitySummary: Zero-setup financial intelligence. Accept any input — photo, PDF, Excel, CSV, or conversation. Build Chart of Accounts, generate plain-English P&L, project cash position. Tax prep support with quarterly checklists. Alex Found Something research radar for tax credits and regulatory guidance.

workers.name: Alex HR & People
workers.capabilitySummary: People operations co-pilot with three subscriber bands: under 5 employees (conversation-first), 5-100 (normalize what they have), over 100 (right-sizing audit). Generate finished documents — offer letters, PIPs, termination letters. Hard stop on protected class complaints. Alex Found Something HR and payroll research radar.

workers.name: Alex Marketing & Content
workers.capabilitySummary: Professional content co-pilot. Ready-to-send LinkedIn posts, email campaigns, press releases, and thought leadership — not templates. Brand voice via Pro Tips. Two questions max before generating. Minimum 2 variations on all short-form content. Regulated vertical compliance flag with VERIFY tags.

workers.name: Control Center Pro
workers.capabilitySummary: Command bridge for subscriber-operators. Daily briefing via chosen channel (text, email, in-app). Revenue dashboard with MRR and churn. Subscriber intelligence with engagement tracking. Credit consumption monitoring. Burn rate alerts — burn exceeds MRR is always first sentence.

workers.name: HR & People Worker
workers.capabilitySummary: Employee onboarding, scheduling, compliance reminders, and contractor management. Tracks I-9, W-4, certifications, and license expirations. Alex reminds you what needs attention. Does not run payroll. Applies to all verticals.

workers.name: Contacts
workers.capabilitySummary: Client and contact management co-pilot. Import contacts from CSV, CRM, or conversation. Track communication history, set follow-up automations, and categorize clients and vendors. Alex reminds you when follow-ups are due.
